item.title: US Egg Prices explained
item.description: MAGAts: "BuT mAh EgGs!!!" Eggscelent comment by @Tarmaccian : @OP Give the source, please! That's Dr. Sarah Taber, an eggscellent agriculturalist and eggspert on how farms can operate efficiently! She also ran for North Carolina Commissioner of Agriculture last year. I've been following her for years to learn how farming interacts with our larger world, and she's always been informative. This public Patreon post has this video: https://www.patreon.com/posts/egg-prices-bird-122048302
item.dc:creator: ewakemanVA

item.description: “Writing in the Daily Telegraph, the UK prime minister said securing a lasting peace in Ukraine "is essential if we are to deter Putin from further aggression in the future"“. Now this is how friends are supposed to behave. PM 'ready' to put troops on ground in Ukraine to protect peace https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4gxgxl3grgo #slava_ukraini #united_kingdom

item.title: These two, I tell ya
item.description:
It's important to stay warm in winter! I think this one is pretty old, but still, I think, a worthwhile addition
Not-so-fun fact: when I did a search for this gif in order to include it in this post, the top results were explicit, face-swapped porn. Ain't 2025 grand? Anyway, Aubrey Plaza is in mourning after a terrible loss. It's nice to remember there were happier times.

item.title: 40 WAYS TO FIGHT FASCISM
item.description: Here is a direct link to download this guide: https://spencersunshine.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/40ways.online.2020.pdf I found it on this popularresistance.org which has this and other resource and links available for download: popularresistance.org/how-to-legally-fight-fascism- Please download, save and share copies of this while you still can.
item.dc:creator: MAN9000

item.title: The Reubl8cans are trying to erase records of STEM women from government services.
item.description: With this absolute dogshit of an administration erasing women from govt agencies, these women are making a stand. In order to appease the fragile egos of mediocre white men, everything from the NPS to NASA has been forced to remove displays and references to women in their history. Give them a hand if you can. https://womenrefusingtobeerased.org/
item.dc:creator: Cryolith

item.title: Luigi Mangione breaks silence in first public statement ...
item.description: "I am overwhelmed by - and grateful for - everyone who has written me to share their stories and express their support. Powerfully, this support has transcended political, racial, and even class divisions, as mail has flooded MDC from across the country, and around the globe. While it is impossible for me to reply to most letters, please know that I read every one that I receive. Thank you again to everyone who took the time to write. I look forward to hearing more in the future." -Luigi Mangione Official Luigi Mangione Legal Defense Information: https://www.luigimangioneinfo.com/ "Due to the extraordinary volume of inquiries and outpouring of support, this site was created and is maintained by Luigi Mangione’s New York legal defense team to provide answers to frequently asked questions, accurate information about his cases, and dispel misinformation. The intent is to share factual information regarding the unprecedented, multiple prosecutions against him."
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: A Few Far Sides in my Dumpy Doo
item.description:
Her acorns bring all the boys to the yard
Always up for some Far Side
KALI MAAAAA
Narrow minded
Bobby would get ALL my handouts
Yo Momma SO FAT
They longcow says "mooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo"
See, it's funny, because crabs have a tendency to scuttle sideways, and shrimp and crawfish have a tendency to swim backward
I do tend to get hangry more often than I'd like
You can tell it's a Dad joke, because it's apparent.
These are pretty tasty, actually
DANGIT, BOB
The glasses totally hide him tho
RONNY IS GOOD DOG, BRONT
They smell nice for a little while too
Intrusive thoughts better stay out
Is that a giant frog on a normal-sized unicorn? Or a normal-sized frog on a tiny unicorn? WE MAY NEVER KNOW
I can see myself buying one someday, tho
WHOOOAAAAA MANNNNNN
Soft kitty, warm kitty, little ball of furrrrrr
JESUS AND AMMO
My dad was after me to be a doctor too. I'M AN ARTEEST
Them Ls are stacking up
Like, ALL of them, because, y'know... science.
Made me feel Dopey too
He looks nice
Poor Snail
Spine is shaped like a big ol' question mark
I'd watch it
His money just grows on trees
I ran into this last week. I just said "Ha, you win the lottery of standing exactly where I need to go, ha! Let me squeeze in there, 'scuse me..."
Every single time. If it's not bird poo, it's rain the very next day.
Blue is Bad, Red is Rad, right?
King's Hawaiian actually does make hotdog buns too, they're tasty
here ya go
yeah, Pot Temperatures are a hoax
Do something you love, and you'll never work a day in your life
item.dc:creator: ddubya42

item.title: Braised Chicken with Creamy Leeks Recipe!
item.description: https://www.triedandtruerecipe.com/braised-chicken-with-creamy-leeks-mushrooms-and-peas/ 4 chicken leg quarters, about 2 to 3 pounds total 1 tablespoon plus 2 teaspoons extra virgin olive oil 8 ounces baby bella mushrooms, scrubbed and sliced 2 leeks, white and light green parts only; halved lengthwise, thoroughly rinsed, and thinly sliced crosswise 1 Vidalia onion, peeled, halved, and thinly sliced ¼ cup champagne vinegar, or use white wine vinegar 1½ cups chicken stock 4 to 6 sprigs thyme ½ cup crème fraîche, or heavy cream 1 cup frozen peas Fresh thyme leaves, optional, for serving Salt and pepper Cook the chicken: Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Pat the chicken dry and season with 1 teaspoon of kosher salt per pound of chicken and ½ teaspoon of black pepper per pound of chicken. Heat 1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil over medium heat in a skillet. Once hot, add the chicken–in batches if needed–and cook without moving for 5 minutes. Flip and cook for an additional 1 to 2 minutes. Transfer the chicken to a plate and leave the skillet on medium. Sauté the mushrooms and leeks: Add the sliced mushrooms to the hot skillet and cook for 6 to 8 minutes to allow the water to cook off the mushrooms. Once the moisture in the skillet evaporates, add 2 teaspoons extra virgin olive oil and a pinch of salt and pepper. Add the sliced onion and leeks to the mushrooms and cook for 10 to 12 minutes, stirring regularly until softened. Taste and season with salt and pepper. Add the champagne vinegar and the chicken stock to the skillet and bring to a boil. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes. Remove from heat. Braise the chicken: Transfer the vegetable mixture to a large baking dish or roasting pan. Arrange the chicken legs, skin-side up, on top of the vegetables. Add the thyme sprigs on top of the chicken. Transfer to the oven and cook, uncovered, for 45 minutes or until an instant-read thermometer reaches 165ºF in the thickest part of the chicken leg. Finish the sauce: Remove the baking dish from the oven but leave the oven at 400ºF. Remove and discard the spent thyme sprigs. Transfer the cooked chicken legs to a plate. Add crème fraîche and frozen peas to the sauce and whisk until the crème fraîche melts. Add a pinch of salt and pepper. Transfer to the oven for 5 minutes to cook the peas. Remove from the oven. You can skim off any excess chicken fat from the top of the sauce and discard it if you prefer. Taste the sauce and season with more salt and pepper if needed. To serve: Arrange the cooked chicken on top of the sauce. Garnish with a few fresh thyme leaves. Enjoy!
item.dc:creator: triedandtruerecipes

item.title: I am not a big fan of uncertainty
item.description: I took a federal job to spend more time with my kids and to have "stability". The past 28 days broke that dream and right now waiting for the hammer to fall due to still being on probation. Haven't been unemployed in a decade plus and just not sure how ready I am to apply to the IT market with all the tech layoffs.
item.dc:creator: ShowMeYourUpvotes

item.title: More Info on Protests
item.description: https://www.npr.org/2025/02/16/nx-s1-5297117/50501-movement-presidents-day-protests-explainer A site to help you find how to get involved near you: https://www.mobilize.us/indivisible/ Depending where you are, you may not find all activities and protests but perhaps it can still help you find something that sings to you to get involved! I had to dig for stuff near me via social media and online searches. So hopefully this helps! Edit: For all those that think that protests are useless, then here's a brief recap of historical protests in the US. Demonstrations don't bring legislation or lawsuits to the table the same way, but large protests are bringing issues to the surface for awareness. Just remember, the US has a history of issues that have evolved because issues with citizens have surfaced. Are we perfect, definitely not. But I have always thought the US was a leading country in tackling many humanitarian issues because the US is a large social group with many ethnic and gender identities that try to fight for their rights to live. Let's not waste time bickering who is wasting time, instead be proactive or suggest other ways to be impactful. https://www.freedomforum.org/famous-protests/
item.dc:creator: Boppit92

item.dc:creator: Scrown0

item.title: You Ignored the Emails & Phone Calls ... "Jeep Is Spamming Drivers With Extended Warranty Ads Through Uconnect Infotainment"
item.description: Owners are reporting the pop-up telling them to "purchase peace of mind" keeps reappearing, even when their trucks are past the warranty's mileage limit. That’s the gripe of one Jeep owner who says their 2022 Grand Cherokee won’t stop serving them pop-up ads on the car’s infotainment screen. They posted a photo of the in-cabin alert to Reddit, which urges them to “Purchase Peace of Mind” by snagging a FlexCare Extended Care Premium plan. Now, it would be one thing if this were a singular occurrence, but the owner says it covers the “entire screen … every time you stop, even if you hit OK.” It also gives the option to make a Bluetooth call, which likely connects you to a rep who can walk you through the sign-up process if you so choose. https://www.thedrive.com/news/jeep-owners-say-pop-up-ads-for-extended-warranties-keep-blocking-their-touchscreens
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
